title: Protocol for preparing minced Artemia nauplii
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8siil","text":"Protocol for preparing minced Artemia napulii as feed for young medusa of upside-down jellyfish ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":96},{"style":"italic","offset":30,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5bl73","text":"Cassiopea andromeda","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19},{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dig44","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ffggj","text":"Laboratory hatched Artemia nauplii (Instar I \u0026 II stage) were filtered using a 250-micron sieve and concentrated to   volume.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":19,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":116,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"fei5j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bqp8c","text":"The Artemia nauplii concentrate were centrifuging @ 8000 rpm for 3 minutes.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":4,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"42ti5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5u29j","text":"The supernatant was removed and Artemia nauplii biomass was macerated using a sterile plastic pestle. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":32,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bntm6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fh7sk","text":"Completely minced Artemia biomass was homogenously mixed with 5 mL of distilled water to make the concentration of 900-1100 nauplii/mL.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":18,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d5a9j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8rclv","text":"Two drops (  ) of minced Artemia biomass was fed to young medusa. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":25,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":11,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"cp9c","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"18tjo","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dmulo","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"amount","mutability":"","data":{"amount":"15","error":false,"guid":"7B13C220CF5E11EB85D447A2922F72A1","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":2}},"1":{"type":"amount","mutability":"","data":{"amount":"100","error":false,"guid":"1C7AF17BC53B11EB90790A58A9FEAC02","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":1}}}}
